intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/3. 20:00 at 92%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 20:00 at 92%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 92% for 20:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/3. 20:00 at 92%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 20:00 at 92%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 46% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 20 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 30 minutes in. 95% at 85-95 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 46% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 46% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 46% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 10:00 at 98%. Then 10min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 98-98% FTP, 85-95 rpm. After this: 10min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 10:00 at 98%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. Then 10min to contemplate your life choices. 98% FTP.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 98% × 10:00. Give it everything. 10min cooldown coming.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 84% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 45min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 84% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 84% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
